title: helianthus × brevifolius
intro: Helianthus × brevifolius, also known as the narrow-leaved sunflower, is a hybrid plant species within the Helianthus genus, characterized by its compact growth and small, daisy-like flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Helianthus × brevifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable herb for various health remedies. Helianthus × brevifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
